diy-hub-v1.current_task_title: Stage 9: Fix broken image URLs + add delete + add qty edit on inventory
diy-hub-v1.approval_phrase: Triggered by NOFI bug report, urgent fix
stage_8_features: AddComponent.tsx: 'Enter manually instead' button added to Confirm dialog (data-testid=btn-enter-manually-from-confirm)
AddComponent.tsx: 'Enter manually instead' button added to Model Picker dialog (data-testid=btn-enter-manually-from-picker)
AddComponent.tsx: Empty-state dialog 'Enter manually' button kept (regression OK)
Inventory.tsx: view toggle UI (Cards | List button group) with data-testids inventory-view-toggle/cards/list
Inventory.tsx: new InventoryRow component (small 48x48 image, dense rows)
lib/storage.ts: NEW helper for localStorage preferences with try/catch + 'diy-hub-v1-' prefix
view state initialized from localStorage and persisted on change
stage_9_features: ROOT CAUSE FIX: Vite dev server (port 5173) does NOT proxy /api/images/* to FastAPI (port 8780). Card img src used relative path -> 404 silently.
NEW lib/url.ts: imageUrl() helper prepends API_BASE so /api/images/foo.jpg becomes http://host:8780/api/images/foo.jpg

NEW backend PATCH /api/components/{id}: partial update (quantity, location, name, model, category, manufacturer, description, voltage, interfaces, key_specs, tags, confidence). Direct columns updated, notes-blob fields merged.
NEW backend DELETE /api/components/{id}: hard delete, returns 204, removes on-disk image file best-effort, 404 if not found
Inventory: QuantityEditor component (click to edit, Enter to save, Escape to cancel, Blur to save, validation >= 1)
Inventory: DeleteButton component on every card (footer) and every row (right side)
Inventory: shadcn Dialog with confirmation: 'Delete [name]? This cannot be undone.' Cancel + Delete buttons
Inventory: PATCH /api/components/{id} on qty change -> updates list in place, success toast
Inventory: DELETE /api/components/{id} on confirm -> removes from list in place, success toast

stage_9_bug_fixes.image_url_bug: Card img src used relative path /api/images/foo.jpg, Vite 404s it. Now uses imageUrl() helper that prepends API_BASE (http://192.168.0.29:8780). Verified: GET http://192.168.0.29:8780/api/images/esp32-devkit-v1-devkit-v1.jpg returns HTTP 200, 121091 bytes, content-type image/jpeg.
stage_9_bug_fixes.fastapi_204_bug: First version of DELETE returned None with status_code=204. FastAPI raised AssertionError on startup: 'Status code 204 must not have a response body'. Fixed by importing Response from fastapi.responses and returning Response(status_code=204).
stage_9_bug_fixes.sqlalchemy_empty_row_bug: First version used .one() which raises NoResultFound for empty result sets, returning HTTP 500 for nonexistent IDs. Fixed by switching to .first() and checking `if not row`.
